RapFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — RAP: Drums: trap patterns, 808 sub kicks, rolling hi-hats, snappy snares. Texture: dark synth pads, vocal chops, ominous melodies, heavy bass lines. Mix: punchy low-end, clear vocal space, controlled 808 sub. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: house, club, dance floor, EDM, pop crossover, four-on-the-floor. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

HipHopFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — HIP-HOP: Drums: boom bap or trap patterns, weighty kicks, crisp snares, swinging hi-hats. Texture: sampled loops, vocal layers, warm pads, melodic hooks. Mix: balanced low-end, clear mid presence, punchy transients. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: house, club, dance floor, EDM, pop crossover. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

RnBFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — R&B: Drums: laid-back groove, soft kick, snappy snare or clap, subtle hi-hats. Texture: lush pads, warm Rhodes, smooth synth leads, rich chord stacks. Mix: warm vocal-forward mix, smooth low-end, polished high-end. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808 sub, street energy, hard-hitting, EDM, house. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

OldSchoolFloor.audit_label: Old School R&B / Hip-Hop Genre Floor
OldSchoolFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — OLD SCHOOL R&B / HIP-HOP: Drums: boom bap breaks, dusty snares, swinging hi-hats, MPC-chopped samples. Texture: soul samples, warm Rhodes, vinyl texture, classic loop-based arrangements. Mix: warm slightly lo-fi character, punchy but not over-compressed. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808, modern trap, EDM, house, club, dance floor. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

PopFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — POP: Drums: punchy kick, bright snare, driving hi-hats, clean programming. Texture: bright synth leads, layered vocals, wide stereo pads, sparkly high-end. Mix: loud bright wide mix, modern loudness standard, hook-forward arrangement. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

AltRockFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — ALTERNATIVE ROCK: Drums: live-feeling kick and snare, driving hi-hats, crash cymbals, natural room sound. Texture: distorted guitars, overdriven bass, raw synth layers, layered guitars. Mix: raw wide dynamic mix, natural transients, not over-compressed. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: 808, trap, EDM, house, club. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

DrillFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — DRILL: Drums: sparse kick, heavy sliding 808, snappy snare, rapid hi-hat triplets. Texture: dark minor piano melodies, ominous string stabs, minimal layers. Mix: heavy sub-bass 808, crisp hi-hats, dark atmospheric low-mid. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: house, dance floor, EDM, bright, uplifting, pop crossover, four-on-the-floor. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

AfrobeatsFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — AFROBEATS: Drums: skip hi-hat pattern, heavy offbeat kick, claps and shakers, talking drum feel, afro-percussion layers. Texture: melodic synth leads, guitar-influenced melodies, warm pads, vocal chops. Mix: warm mid-forward, punchy percussion, clear melodic space. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: 808 slides, dark ominous, trap hi-hats, aggressive. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

NeoSoulFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — NEO-SOUL: Drums: slightly behind the beat, warm snares, brushed hi-hats, shuffle feel, ghost notes. Texture: warm Rhodes and electric piano, jazz-influenced chord voicings, organic bass, vocal harmonies. Mix: warm analog feel, vocal-forward, not over-compressed. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808, modern pop production, bright digital synths, hard-hitting, EDM. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

LoFiFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — LO-FI / CHILL HOP: Drums: slightly off-beat chopped drum breaks, soft kick, snappy rimshot, lo-fi texture, gentle swing. Texture: warm vintage keys, jazz-influenced chord melodies, ambient pads, vinyl noise. Mix: deliberately lo-fi — warm, slightly muffled, natural vinyl character. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808s, modern crisp production, four-on-the-floor, EDM, punchy. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

HouseFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — HOUSE: Drums: four-on-the-floor kick, open hi-hats on offbeats, claps on 2 and 4, driving constant rhythm. Texture: warm piano chord stabs, synth pads, bass line, soulful vocal elements. Mix: clear sub bass, bright punchy kick, wide stereo field. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808 slides, dark ominous, boom bap, hip-hop breaks. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

GospelFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — GOSPEL: Drums: powerful snares, driving hi-hats, gospel groove, building energy. Texture: Hammond organ, piano runs, choir harmonies, strings for swells, rich vocal layers. Mix: room-filling, warm powerful low-mids, vocal space for choir. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap 808s, dark ominous, minimalist, hard-hitting street energy, EDM. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

ReggaetonFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — REGGAETON / DANCEHALL: Drums: dembow pattern (kick on 1 and and-of-2), rimshot, offbeat hi-hats, shakers, Latin percussion. Texture: reggaeton synth lines, tropical melodic hooks, bass-forward arrangement. Mix: punchy kick and bass, warm mid-range, danceable dynamics. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap 808 slides, boom bap, dark ominous, heavy distortion. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

FunkFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — FUNK: Drums: tight kick on the one, syncopated snare, hi-hat chops, ghost notes, pocket groove. Texture: slap bass, clipped rhythm guitar, brass stabs, organ fills. Mix: punchy low-mids, clear bass presence, crisp mid-range, breathing dynamics. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: trap, 808 subs, dark ominous, EDM, modern pop. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

CountryFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — COUNTRY / COUNTRY POP: Drums: live-feel kick and snare, shuffle hi-hat, driving rhythm, natural acoustic feel. Texture: acoustic guitar rhythm, steel guitar or fiddle lines, piano, layered vocals. Mix: warm natural sound, guitar-forward, vocal clarity, Nashville polish. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: 808 trap, dark ominous, EDM, house, heavy distortion. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.

JazzFloor.injection: GENRE FLOOR — JAZZ: Drums: swing hi-hat pattern, ride cymbal, brushes or sticks, ghost notes, natural dynamics. Texture: piano voicings with extensions (9ths, 11ths, 13ths), walking bass, horns or vibraphone, space in the arrangement. Mix: natural acoustic space, balanced open dynamics, not over-compressed. FORBIDDEN TERMS — never use: 808s, trap, EDM, four-on-the-floor, heavy compression. Do NOT infer or change genre based on BPM.
